\tzpentry{ID3685}{Capacitance Tensor Coupling}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3685 introduces Capacitance Tensor Coupling as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} C(O_A, O_B) = \text{Tr}[(O_A \otimes O_B) \rho_{AB}] - \text{Tr}[O_A \rho_A] \text{Tr}[O_B \rho_B] \end{equation}
